name: Create Your Account
body:
If you have more questions, please reach out to our support team at support@jetsend.com.

 

Pricing Plan

The pricing plan for JetSend is available on our website (https://jetsend.com/pricing) and outlines all the plans in detail.

If you are already a customer and want to know your pricing plan, go to the Account Settings page. For more information, see Manage Your Subscription Plan.

For any queries regarding the payment plans, please reach out to our support team at support@jetsend.com.

 

Register With JetSend

To get started, sign up for a free trial. Once you have completed the registration and verification process, your free account is created and available to you. When you decide to upgrade to a paid plan, you can do so on the Account Settings page of the application.
